name: nodeorchestrator
description: Monorepo root — orchestrates CMS and Node worker processes locally

scripts.kill:nodes: lsof -ti :4001,:4002,:4003,:4004,:4005 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'All node workers killed'
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix cms && npm install --prefix node-app && npm install --prefix frontend
